title: phaius lyonii
intro: Phaius lyonii, also known as the Lyon's orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to the mountainous regions of Japan and Taiwan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaius lyonii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Phaius lyonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for consumption, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and interactions.
